pi_items.source: Task description and export_result.sh consistently reference this path (line 10)
Natural Earth Populated Places dataset includes pop_max attribute (documented at naturalearthdata.com). Confirmed present in ne_110m_populated_places shapefile.

GeoServer RasterSymbolizer ColorMap documentation supports gradient rendering with multiple color entries. 4+ colors is standard for heatmap visualization. Task description specifies gradient with 'at least 4 colors'.

PNG compression of 800x400 pixel image with meaningful heatmap rendering should easily exceed 5000 bytes. This is a reasonable minimum threshold for detecting actual rendered content vs blank/error images.

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a heatmap rendering of the Natural Earth Populated Places dataset (ne_110m_populated_places, imported from public source). The layer is published in GeoServer as 'ne:ne_populated_places' with population density weighted by the 'pop_max' attribute. The expected style name is 'heatmap_population', using GeoServer's vec:Heatmap rendering transformation with a color gradient of at least 4 colors. The output image should be saved to /home/ga/heatmap_output.png at 800x400 pixels, with minimum size of 5000 bytes. All metadata values reference established Natural Earth dataset structures and GeoServer's documented Heatmap transformation capabilities.
